checkpointing.strategy: After each authoritative completed week, export localStorage.jones_fastlane_save to disk. If browser continuity fails, restore the latest checkpoint into the named session before replaying from onboarding.

slice_policy.default_goal: Advance exactly one completed in-game week for the active persona unless a major blocker or especially high-signal audit event happens first.
slice_policy.detail_log_policy: Write one canonical per-slice detail file per completed week and keep the progress report concise.

next_slice: Start Persona A from onboarding in `phase11-safe-grinder`, complete exactly one authoritative Week 1 slice, write `docs/workflows/cyberpunk-overhaul/phase-11-slices/persona-a/week-01.md`, and export a durable checkpoint immediately after the week closes.

last_run.summary: Persona A was reset to a fresh Week 1 start. The previous Week 1-10 run was archived, the active audit surfaces were cleared, and the workflow now resumes from onboarding with durable checkpoint exports required after each authoritative week.
